creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: beat
Date: Thu Sep 26 13:14:25 2013
New Revision: 328354
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/328354

Log:
  - Depend on devel/xdg-utils instead of installing its own version [1]
  - Support staging
  - Bump PORTREVISION
  
  PR:		ports/181920 [1]
  Submitted by:	G. Paul Ziemba <p-fbsd-bugs@ziemba.us> [1]

Modified:
  head/deskutils/thinkingrock/Makefile

Modified: head/deskutils/thinkingrock/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/deskutils/thinkingrock/Makefile	Thu Sep 26 12:54:08 2013	(r328353)
+++ head/deskutils/thinkingrock/Makefile	Thu Sep 26 13:14:25 2013	(r328354)
@@ -3,7 +3,7 @@
 
 PORTNAME=	thinkingrock
 PORTVERSION=	2.2.1
-PORTREVISION=	1
+PORTREVISION=	2
 CATEGORIES=	deskutils java
 MASTER_SITES=	SF/${PORTNAME}/ThinkingRock/TR%20${PORTVERSION}
 DISTNAME=	tr-${PORTVERSION}
@@ -11,13 +11,15 @@ DISTNAME=	tr-${PORTVERSION}
 MAINTAINER=	beat@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	Application for collecting and processing your thoughts
 
+RUN_DEPENDS=	${LOCALBASE}/bin/xdg-open:${PORTSDIR}/devel/xdg-utils \
+		${LOCALBASE}/bin/xdg-email:${PORTSDIR}/devel/xdg-utils
+
 USE_JAVA=	yes
 JAVA_VERSION=	1.6+
 NO_BUILD=	yes
 
 SUB_FILES=	pkg-message
 
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 .include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
 
 post-patch:
@@ -29,15 +31,11 @@ post-patch:
 		${WRKSRC}/bin/tr_w.exe ${WRKSRC}/etc/tr.conf.bak
 
 do-install:
-	@${MKDIR} ${PREFIX}/${PORTNAME}
-	@${CP} -r ${WRKSRC}/* ${PREFIX}/${PORTNAME}
-	@${CHOWN} -R ${SHAREOWN}:${SHAREGRP} ${PREFIX}/${PORTNAME}
-	@${LN} -sf ${PREFIX}/${PORTNAME}/bin/tr ${PREFIX}/bin/${PORTNAME}
-	@${LN} -sf ${PREFIX}/${PORTNAME}/bin/xdg-email ${PREFIX}/bin/xdg-email
-	@${LN} -sf ${PREFIX}/${PORTNAME}/bin/xdg-open ${PREFIX}/bin/xdg-open
+	@${MKDIR} ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/${PORTNAME}
+	@${CP} -r ${WRKSRC}/* ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/${PORTNAME}
+	@${CHOWN} -R ${SHAREOWN}:${SHAREGRP} ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/${PORTNAME}
+	@${LN} -sf ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/${PORTNAME}/bin/tr ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/bin/${PORTNAME}
 	@${ECHO} bin/${PORTNAME} >> ${TMPPLIST}
-	@${ECHO} bin/xdg-email >> ${TMPPLIST}
-	@${ECHO} bin/xdg-open >> ${TMPPLIST}
 	@(cd ${WRKSRC}; ${FIND} . ! -type d) | ${SORT} | ${SED} "s|^.|${PORTNAME}|" >> ${TMPPLIST}
 	@(cd ${WRKSRC}; ${FIND} . -type d) | ${SORT} -r | ${SED} "s|^.|@dirrm ${PORTNAME}|" >> ${TMPPLIST}
 	@(cd ${WRKSRC}; ${FIND} . -type d -empty) | ${SORT} -r | ${SED} "s|^.|@exec mkdir -p ${PORTNAME}|" >> ${TMPPLIST}
_______________________________________________

http://lists.freebsd.org/mailman/listinfo/svn-ports-all
